text:
## Quality Audit Results

**Count: 2** Linear issues are marked `done` but no merged PR actually closes them.

| Linear Issue | PR Claiming to Close | PR State | PR Repo |
|---|---|---|---|
| **ENG-167** | "Rate limiter false positives: fix rate-limiter" | **open** (not merged) | acme/web |
| **ENG-199** | "Onboarding funnel drop-off: instrument onboarding-funnel" | **closed** (not merged) | acme/web |

Both issues are in Linear `done` state, and each has at least one PR that claims to close it (via `closes_linear`), but **neither PR was merged** — one is still open, the other was closed without merging.

;; Verify: intersect with linear-done-ids to be precise
(def verified (filter (fn [id] (and (contains? linear-done-ids id)
                                    (contains? pr-linear-ids id)
                                    (not (contains? merged-linear-ids id))))
                      (seq pr-linear-ids)))
{:count (count verified) :ids (sort verified)}
"}
